comment.body: @Alma - few clarification q’s from weekend’s post - you stated dealers are net long vomma with more vomma on the downside - which would suggest dealers are long wings. But the left tail risk comes from positioning where they are short zomma ( short ATM) which in case vol gets a bid their gamma bleeds quicker than what braking mechanism their vomma positions will generate. So essentially long vanna and short zomma . For calm week , positioning looks safe because dealers are long vol (wings) through vomma but the danger is the pathway -the negative Zomma ensures that the transition from "Stable" to "Crashed" is a violent jump rather than a smooth slide. Kindly let me know if I’m interpreting it correctly
